title: Add Gemini proposal-only review lane
goal: Define and test a Gemini review/scout lane that consumes bounded context without sensitive values and returns structured proposal-only findings or patch suggestions.

metadata.safety_boundary: proposal-only review lane after preflight; no push, merge, runtime mutation, repository mutation by Gemini, credential exposure, automatic dispatch, or queue mutation
metadata.ordering_note: Execution order is governed by depends_on; this task remains blocked until T008 is accepted.

acceptance.assertion: Agent briefing requires allowed_scope, forbidden_changes, input_artifacts, output_schema, max_runtime and no-credential/no-push/no-merge/no-runtime-mutation constraints.
Gemini output is machine-readable and limited to proposal, blocked or no_action outcomes.
The lane does not grant write, push, merge, runtime or credential authority to Gemini.
Any patch proposal requires Grabowski or human review before effect.
The Gemini review lane is not active until the Gemini capability and sandbox preflight task is accepted.
